I’m sharing this because the non-Iranian community needs to know the truth. Since late December, Iran has been pushed to the edge. This isn’t just a protest; it is a revolution for survival. The government has imposed a nationwide internet blackout to hide the fact that they are shooting people in the streets.
Because of this, I, as well as all of my friends, haven’t been able to speak to our loved ones. We don’t even know if they are safe.
They have ruined a beautiful, resource-rich country, turning our economy into one of the worst in the world as the currency collapses. They are brutally murdering anyone who speaks out against the extreme ideology forced on us for decades. We are so desperate for freedom that we look at Venezuela with "jealousy" just for a glimmer of hope.
Please, be our voice while our people are being silenced. 🕊️
